name: HRC_TXN_CHILD_OBJECTS
description: Transaction Model table: stores one row for each database row that the parent transaction will change. It is used to detect concurrent changes where traditional database locking can't reach.

columns.Name: OVN_AT_SUBMIT
columns.Comments: The OVN of the child record at the time of submit

columns.Name: PARENT_TXN_ID
columns.Comments: The transaction which this change is part of. Foreign key to hrc_txn_header transaction_id

columns.Name: PARENT_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: The ObjectId from the transaction this is part of

columns.Name: CHILD_OBJ
columns.Comments: The table name of the row being changed

columns.Name: CHILD_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key value of the row being changed

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
